# Testing Suricata

**Dataset**: `corelight_zeek_raw`

```sql
dataset = corelight_zeek_raw
| filter _path = "suricata_corelight"
| fields alert_category, id_orig_h , id_resp_h, alert_rule , alert_metadata
//| comp count() as t by id_orig_h addrawdata = true
```
